arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Chelsea Premier League clash simulated to get a London derby score prediction
arts.sum: We predict that Tottenham could line up in a 4-3-3 formation, with their starting XI as follows: Forster; Porro, Romero, Dragusin, Udogie; Sarr, Bissouma, Kulusevski; Johnson, Solanke, Son. Chelsea continued their impressive form of late with a 5-1 win over Southampton midweek, leaving the Blues second in the league and just seven points off top spot following Liverpool's 3-3 draw with Newcastle.
